intro.title: Migrate your account to Jokers of Neon

connect.title: Connect your accounts
connect.disclaimer: Cartridge Controller will no longer be supported in future versions of Jokers of Neon. To keep your progress and cards, move them to a new or existing Jokers of Neon account. This change cannot be undone. Make sure you have connected the correct accounts before continuing.

jokers.title: Connect or create your Jokers of Neon account
jokers.unavailable: You cannot access your Jokers of Neon account right now.
jokers.auth-error: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.

confirmation.title: Confirm migration
confirmation.description: You are about to permanently move all your progress and cards from Cartridge Controller to your Jokers of Neon account. This change cannot be undone.

retry.title: Retry migration
retry.description: We'll only retry the parts of the migration that were not completed.

cleanup.title: Complete migration
cleanup.description: Your cards and progress are already in your new account. Confirm one final step in Cartridge to remove the temporary permissions used during the migration.

migration.in-progress-description: This migration can take several minutes. Please do not close this tab.
migration.counting-cards-description: We're getting everything ready. This may take a few seconds.
migration.phase-transfers: We're moving your cards to your new account.
migration.phase-roguelike: We're migrating your Roguelike mode progress.
migration.phase-cleanup: Your cards and progress are already in your new account. Complete the final step to finish.
migration.success: The migration is complete. You can now sign in to Jokers of Neon with your new account.
migration.error: We couldn't complete the migration. Please try again.
